message:
fix(why): Improve session path resolution for diary lookups

Improve buildWhyResult to handle various session path formats:
- Direct diary IDs (no path separators)
- Diary JSON files under diaryDir
- Session paths from IDE that need findDiaryBySession lookup

Uses path.relative() to detect if a JSON file is within diaryDir,
ensuring proper diary loading regardless of input format.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
